title: POS Sessions
description: Track cashier operating sessions, POS lineage, and linked cash drawer context.
accessDeniedTitle: POS Sessions access is not enabled for your user.
accessDeniedDescription: The page requires {permission}. If this was just added, refresh permissions or rebuild the user permission cache.
activeDescription: This is the current user-owned operating session used for POS order lineage.
noActiveDescription: Open a session before manual POS work, or let new order entry auto-open one.
historyDescription: Review current and closed POS sessions for audit and reconciliation support.
drawerCloseDescription: This POS session is linked to an open cash drawer. Count and close the drawer before closing the POS session.

banner.open: POS session {sessionNo} is active for this branch.
banner.paused: POS session {sessionNo} is paused. Resume it before posting POS finance rows.
banner.none: No POS session is open yet. It will be auto-opened when you submit this POS order.
banner.branchConflict: You already have an active POS session in another branch. Close it before starting POS in this branch.

hub.title: Session Hub
hub.description: Operational POS context for this order screen.
hub.branchConflictTitle: Active session is in another branch
hub.drawerRestricted: Cash drawer details are restricted for your user. POS lineage remains visible, but physical cash reconciliation details require cash drawer view permission.
hub.openToLoadSummary: Open POS session details to load finance summary.
hub.forceCloseWarning: Force-close is an audited override. It does not silently force-close a linked cash drawer.
hub.linkDrawerTitle: Choose or open a cash drawer
hub.linkDrawerDescription: Use an open drawer session, or explicitly open a drawer and link it to this POS session.
hub.drawerLinkNoViewPermission: Cash drawer setup requires cash drawer view permission.
hub.drawerListError: Unable to load cash drawers for this branch.
hub.noDrawersForBranch: No active cash drawers are configured for this branch.
hub.resumeBeforeDrawerLink: Resume the POS session before linking a cash drawer.

drawerClose.movementContextHelp: Movement rows are shown for audit context; this POS close step uses the linked cash payment total for expected cash.
drawerClose.expectedCashHelp: Expected cash here mirrors the current cash-drawer close API calculation: opening float plus linked cash payments.
drawerClose.summaryUnavailable: Drawer totals could not be loaded. You can still count and close; the server will validate the close.

messages.selectBranch: Select a branch before opening a POS session.
messages.countedCashRequired: Enter the counted cash amount before closing the drawer.
messages.drawerStillOpen: Close the linked cash drawer first.
messages.drawerClosePermissionRequired: You need cash drawer close permission to complete this step.
messages.drawerLinked: Cash drawer linked to this POS session.
messages.drawerOpenedAndLinked: Cash drawer opened and linked to this POS session.
messages.drawerLinkFailed: Unable to link the cash drawer to this POS session.
